approveInheritance().details: Requires 2/3 guardians to approve (same threshold as recovery)

denyInheritance().details: If owner is alive and accessible, they can deny the request

finalizeInheritance().details: Requires 2/3 guardian approvals AND inheritor must already have a vault This ensures inheritor is a responsible user who understands the system Deceased's vault remains locked for records

params.limit: Maximum number of results to return (0 for default of 50)

guardianCancelInheritance().details: Requires 2/3 guardians to cancel if owner is unreachable Use case: Next of Kin files claim while owner is traveling (unreachable)

requestInheritance().details: Requires guardian approval OR DAO approval to prevent gaming Owner can deny the request if called prematurely

rescueETH(address).details: Owner can withdraw ETH that was accidentally sent to the vault H-4 Fix: Added nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via malicious recipient

rescueToken(address,address,uint256).details: For tokens accidentally sent to vault

setAbnormalTransactionThreshold(bool,uin.details: User can choose between fixed amount or percentage of vault balance

params._fixedAmount: Fixed amount threshold in wei (e.g., 50000 * 1e18 for 50k VFIDE)
params._percentageBps: Percentage threshold in basis points (e.g., 5000 = 50%, 2500 = 25%)  Examples: - setAbnormalTransactionThreshold(false, 10000 * 1e18, 0) = Fixed 10k VFIDE - setAbnormalTransactionThreshold(true, 0, 2500) = 25% of vault balance - setAbnormalTransactionThreshold(true, 0, 7500) = 75% of vault balance
params._usePercentage: True to use percentage, false to use fixed amount

setBalanceSnapshotMode(bool).details: When enabled, uses snapshot balance for calculations to prevent threshold manipulation

params._useSnapshot: True to use balance snapshot, false to use current balance

setFrozen(bool).details: Owner can freeze/unfreeze anytime. Useful when wallet might be compromised

params._frozen: True to freeze vault, false to unfreeze

updateBalanceSnapshot().details: Allows owner to update snapshot after significant deposits

cleanupExpiredTransaction(uint256).notice: Clean up expired pending transaction to free storage

denyInheritance().notice: Owner denies inheritance request (prevents gaming/premature claims)

finalizeInheritance().notice: Finalize inheritance - transfer funds to Next of Kin's vault

getAbnormalTransactionThreshold().notice: Get current abnormal transaction threshold based on user preference

getPendingTransactions(uint256,uint256).notice: Get all pending transactions (paginated to prevent gas exhaustion)

getTransactionWithExpiry(uint256).notice: Get pending transaction with expiry info

guardianCancelInheritance().notice: Guardians vote to cancel fraudulent inheritance request

requestInheritance().notice: Next of Kin requests inheritance transfer

rescueETH(address).notice: Rescue stuck ETH accidentally sent to vault

rescueToken(address,address,uint256).notice: Rescue any ERC20 token (except VFIDE which uses transferVFIDE)

setAbnormalTransactionThreshold(bool,uin.notice: Set threshold for abnormal transaction detection

setBalanceSnapshotMode(bool).notice: Set balance snapshot mode for percentage-based thresholds

setFrozen(bool).notice: Freeze vault to prevent ALL transactions (like freezing ATM card)

updateBalanceSnapshot().notice: Update balance snapshot (when in snapshot mode)
